_meta.iran_note: Traffic will appear as HTTPS to www.aparat.com, which is on Iran's NIN domestic CDN allowlist. XTLS-Reality borrows the TLS cert of the target domain — SIAM DPI cannot distinguish it from legitimate domestic HTTPS without decrypting the session.
